title: Flaky Uruguayan-Style Vegetable Casserole
description: A vegetarian take on the classic Uruguayan dish, this casserole features flaky pastry and a variety of roasted vegetables.
instructions: Peel and slice the onion, eggplant, zucchini, and mushrooms.
In a large skillet, sauté the vegetables in butter until tender.
Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a separate bowl, mix the sliced tomato and cheddar cheese (if using).
Roll out the flaky pastry and place in a one-pot casserole dish.
Add the vegetable mixture to the pastry-lined dish.
Top with the tomato and cheese mixture.
Cover the dish with another sheet of pastry and crimp the edges.
Brush the top of the pastry with butter and cut a few slits for ventilation.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
